skill_loop.repeat_policy: serial pass, one lever per commit

target.scenario: 1000-equation linear Add chain with final output marked used

baseline_fingerprint.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-interpreters-profile rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-interpreters --bench pe_baseline -- --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 1 --warm-up-time 1

profile_hotspots.evidence: Criterion rch baseline ranked dce/all_used/1000eq as the slowest fj-interpreters pe_baseline case

opportunity_matrix.lever: Remove the keep_eqn Vec<bool> allocation and second pass in dce_jaxpr by collecting retained equations during the reverse dependency walk.

change.summary: retained_eqns is populated while walking equations in reverse, then reversed once to restore original equation order

after.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-interpreters-profile rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-interpreters --bench pe_baseline -- dce/all_used/1000eq --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 1 --warm-up-time 1

benchmark_delta.note: Workers differ, so confidence is bounded; the measured win is aligned with the removed allocation/filter pass.

isomorphism_proof.ordering_preserved: yes - equations are inspected in the same reverse dependency order, retained equations are cloned once, and retained_eqns.reverse() restores the original forward order
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking_unchanged: yes - no tie-breaking data structure or comparator changed
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: N/A - DCE graph pruning does not evaluate floating-point operations
isomorphism_proof.rng: N/A - no RNG paths are touched

validation.result: nonzero due existing fj-interpreters monolith inventory; no unsafe blocks or formatting issues; reported pre-existing unwrap/expect/assert/index findings and an Instant::now false-positive

validation.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-interpreters-profile rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-interpreters test_dce_all_used_large_chain_golden_hash -- --nocapture
RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-interpreters-profile rch exec -- cargo check -p fj-interpreters --all-targets
RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-interpreters-profile rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-interpreters --all-targets
RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-interpreters-profile rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-interpreters --all-targets -- -D warnings

decision.reason: Profile-backed top benchmark improved by 7.67 percent with unchanged DCE output digest and focused crate-scoped validation.
